# Copilot Instructions for live_fpl_league

## Visual Changes
- In all pull requests that affect the visuals of this app, one or more screenshots should be added to the pull request, to show the result of the change
- The screenshots generated should show realistic information (avoid having identical gameweek scores for all players for instance) that is relevant to the pull request or issue it is addressing

## Testing
- Always add new tests when adding new functionality, to verify that the functionality works
